isi.lyrics:
Lyric DADA & Litty - Dangerous Remix

Romanization

wiheomhae nareul boneun neo
neomu miryeonhae yeah I already know
ibeonen neoreul gajil geoya
wae neon ireon nae mameul jakku mireonaelkka?

ssiseonae jinan irin geol
geuman mireonae nae mam almyeonseo
ibeonen neoreul gajil geoya
wae neon ireon nae mameul jakku mireonaelkka?

Finally neon nareul joahage doel geoya
geureoni seoroui mameul jaeji malja
i sigani geunyang heureuge duji ana
Why don't you with me? yeah
nan nege mareul geolji yeah

ijeobeorige hae neomu apasseotdeon ildo
jujeohajima ijeneun naega neoreul mideo
da jugosipeo sasohan useumkkajido
neol bogosipeo come to me tonight boy

sumgiryeohajima no time babe
eoriji ana I'm 97 baby
neoraneun sarami waenji natseoljiga anaseo
dagagago sipeunde

dareun aedeulgwa dalla neon
hanahana gudi modeun geol
seolmyeonghaji anado
jeombu aneun deuthan nega neomu joeun geol

wiheomhae nareul boneun neo
neomu miryeonhae yeah I already know
ibeonen neoreul gajil geoya
wae neon ireon nae mameul jakku mireonaelkka?

ssiseonae jinan irin geol
geuman mireonae nae mam almyeonseo
ibeonen neoreul gajil geoya
wae neon ireon nae mameul jakku mireonaelkka?

you're just sittin' on my brain
if you don't say it then geumanhae
please get out of my way
I need to grind hard n get money

I thought we had the same bright vision
now we're like headin' to a big collision
been crazy bout you, like I'm on a mission
(it's over but.. I still kinda miss you)

whatchu gon' do?
私がどっかに行ったらI won't go back
whatchu gon' do?
if I leave youきっとなるよyou'll have no luck

whatchu gon' do?
甘い言葉かけられても
もう戻らない, aye-yeah
戻らない永遠

2人で乗り込むtaxi
laughin' so hard in the back seat
半分わけあうice cream
felt like I was in a nice dream

I like you but you're fadin' in my head
shy guy like you just gotta be brave

dareun aedeulgwa dalla neon
hanahana gudi modeun geol
seolmyeonghaji anado
jeombu aneun deuthan nega neomu joeun geol

wiheomhae nareul boneun neo
neomu miryeonhae yeah I already know
ibeonen neoreul gajil geoya
wae neon ireon nae mameul jakku mireonaelkka?

ssiseonae jinan irin geol
geuman mireonae nae mam almyeonseo
ibeonen neoreul gajil geoya
wae neon ireon nae mameul jakku mireonaelkka?

Hangeul

위험해 나를 보는 너
너무 미련해 yeah I already know
이번엔 너를 가질 거야
왜 넌 이런 내 맘을 자꾸 밀어낼까?

씻어내 지난 일인 걸
그만 밀어내 내 맘 알면서
이번엔 너를 가질 거야
왜 넌 이런 내 맘을 자꾸 밀어낼까?

Finally 넌 나를 좋아하게 될 거야
그러니 서로의 맘을 재지 말자
이 시간이 그냥 흐르게 두지 않아
Why don't you with me? yeah
난 네게 말을 걸지 yeah

잊어버리게 해 너무 아팠었던 일도
주저하지마 이제는 내가 너를 믿어
다 주고싶어 사소한 웃음까지도
널 보고싶어 come to me tonight boy

숨기려하지마 no time babe
어리지 않아 I'm 97 baby
너라는 사람이 왠지 낯설지가 않아서
다가가고 싶은데

다른 애들과 달라 넌
하나하나 굳이 모든 걸
설명하지 않아도
전부 아는 듯한 네가 너무 좋은 걸

해야 이 밤 안에
가지런히 놓인 햇 빛

재와 이 바람에

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Herhums - Play

Romanization

When I was a child, mother use to say
Don't you worry, go on and play

All these ageless years gently appear
reels into a bliss

When I was a child, mother use to say

Hangeul

When I was a child, mother use to say
Don't you worry, go on and play

All these ageless years gently appear
reels into a bliss

When I was a child, mother use to say

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Herhums - Rewind

Romanization

Vast is the meadow
Breathing through the hollow
Rewind, finally

Shimmering rays are flickering on rivers
beyond all the radiant stars

Effortless beings, we'll be gently crossing by

Leaving no trails behind
We'll be gentle flourished by green grass

Hangeul

Vast is the meadow
Breathing through the hollow
Rewind, finally

Shimmering rays are flickering on rivers
beyond all the radiant stars

Effortless beings, we'll be gently crossing by

Leaving no trails behind
We'll be gentle flourished by green grass

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Herhums - Possa

Romanization

jitge gwitgae daneun sori
daeul deut yorijori
momeul seuchimyeo
inae pume

gipge pagodeuneun ne dari
ttaseuhan neoui jari
saireul jophimyeo
bamsae gyeote inne

Hangeul

짙게 귓가에 닿는 소리
닿을 듯 요리조리
몸을 스치며
이내 품에

깊게 파고드는 네 다리
따스한 너의 자리
사이를 좁히며
밤새 곁에 있네
